tasks.label: 📄 pandoc (Mac)
tasks.command: pandoc 内容.md -o index.html --standalone --include-after-body=action.html --variable title='' --metadata title='ἀπορία'

tasks.label: 🚀 git push
tasks.command: git add . && git commit -m '.' && git push
